search:java-spring-security-jwt:spring s.content:
- **Latest Versions**: Spring Boot 3.1, Spring Security 6
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.security.jwt.secret`: Secret key for signing JWTs.
  - `spring.security.jwt.token.expiration`: Expiration time of the JWT token.
- **CLI Commands**:
  ```bash
  mvn clean install
  ```
- **Dependencies in `pom.xml`**:
  ```xml
  <dependency>
      <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
      <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
  </dependency>
  <dependency>
      <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
      <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
      <version>0.11.5</version>
  </dependency>
  <dependency>
      <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
      <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
      <version>0.11.5</version>
      <scope>runtime</scope>
  </dependency>
  <dependency>
      <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
      <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
      <version>0.11.5</version>
      <scope>runtime</scope>
  </dependency>
  ```

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `git clone https://github.com/bezkoder/spring-boot-spring-security-jwt-authentication.git`
  - `mvn clean install`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Boot: 3.0.x
  - Spring Security: 6.x

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `application.properties`: 
    ```properties
    spring.security.user.name=admin
    spring.security.user.password=password
    ```
  - JWT Configuration:
    ```java
    @Bean
    public JwtEncoder jwtEncoder() {
        return new NimbusJwtEncoder(new ImmutableSecret<>(secretKey.getBytes()));
    }
    ```

- **Dependencies**:
  - `spring-boot-starter-security`
  - `spring-boot-starter-data-jpa`
  - `io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-api`
  - `io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-impl`
  - `io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-jackson`

search:java-spring-security-jwt:secure r.content:
- **CLI Commands**: Use `mvn clean install` to build your project.
- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Boot: 3.0.5
  - Spring Security: 6.0.2
  - JWT: 0.9.1
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `application.properties`: Configure security settings, e.g., `spring.security.user.name=admin`, `spring.security.user.password=password`.
  - `SecurityConfig.java`: Implement JWT authentication and authorization.
  - `JwtTokenProvider.java`: Generate and validate JWT tokens.
  - `@EnableWebSecurity`: Enable Spring Security configuration.
  - `HttpSecurity`: Configure HTTP security rules, e.g., `.authorizeRequests().antMatchers("/api/public/**").permitAll()`.
- **Dependencies**:
  ```xml
  <dependency>
      <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
      <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
  </dependency>
  <dependency>
      <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
      <artifactId>jjwt</artifactId>
      <version>0.9.1</version>
  </dependency>
  ```
- **Environment Variables**:
  - `JWT_SECRET`: Secret key for JWT signing.
  - `JWT_EXPIRATION_MS`: Token expiration time in milliseconds.
